pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and modernize the framework stack.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and introduces breaking API changes (Jakarta EE namespace); staying on 2.6.x prevents using modern features and may cause compatibility issues with newer dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to compile and run on the newer JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would still target Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially failing if the build environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the Flyway MySQL driver dependency to support database migrations with MySQL in newer Flyway versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: Newer versions of Flyway split database-specific drivers into separate artifacts; without this, Flyway may fail to connect to MySQL at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the legacy MySQL Connector/J artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; using it causes dependency resolution failures or runtime errors.
